# Test Fixture Data Sources

This directory contains data adapted from the following Apache-2.0 projects, copyright held by the original authors:
- headroom — © 2025 Headroom Contributors (Apache-2.0, see LICENSE-headroom)
- rtk — © 2024 rtk-ai Labs (Apache-2.0, see LICENSE-rtk)

Per-file origins are listed in the `origin` field of manifest.toml. Fixture files retain upstream original bytes without in-file comments (to avoid breaking JSON/polluting input).

Only representative samples from each category are included, not the complete set.
